member.name: T:AdbSharp.DeviceManager
member.summary: Discovers Android devices using registered USB transports.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Discovery.DefaultTransportProvider
member.summary: Registers the native platform USB providers included with the facade package.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Discovery.DefaultTransportProvider.RegisterBuiltInTransports
member.summary: Registers built-in Windows, Linux, and macOS transport providers once.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Discovery.DefaultTransportProvider.RegisterBuiltInLockOwnerResolvers
member.summary: Registers built-in Windows, Linux, and macOS USB lock owner resolvers once.
